name: Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix sugar, flour, and salt with cold milk.
2. Gradually add scalded milk while stirring constantly.
3. Cook over low heat until thickened.
4. Add beaten egg yolks; cook for 2 more minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and shredded coconut.
6. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
7. Prepare meringue using 3 egg whites and 2 tablespoons granulated sugar per each egg.
- Beat egg whites until stiff, glossy, and hold their shape when bowl is inverted.
- Gently fold in the sugar while gradually adding to the meringue mixture.
8. Spread meringue over the pie filling.
This recipe makes one 9-inch pie.
